name: dogfood
description: Systematically explore and QA a web application in a real browser, find bugs and UX issues, and produce a structured report with full reproduction evidence: step-by-step screenshots, repro GIFs when recording is available, and detailed repro steps for every finding. Drives Claude in Chrome (mcp__claude-in-chrome__*) for interactive/authenticated flows and the Playwright CLI for deterministic headless screenshots, so findings can be handed straight to the responsible team.
